title: I'm in Fashion
body:
## "I'm in fashion, darling. I don't have to know anything."

Edina Monsoon, Absolutely Fabulous

title: Sweetie Darling
body:
## "Sweetie, darling!"

Edina Monsoon, Absolutely Fabulous

title: Cashback
body:
## "Cashback!"

Alan Partridge

title: Spared No Expense
body:
## "Jurassic Park. Spared no expense."

Alan Partridge (Steve Coogan)

title: BBC Weather
body:
## "Scattered showers and sunny intervals, with a chance of everything."

Traditional BBC Weather Forecast

title: Comedy is a funny way
body:
## "Comedy is a funny way of being serious."

Benny Hill

title: Democracy
body:
## "Democracy is a device that ensures we shall be governed no better than we deserve."

George Bernard Shaw

title: Two Countries, One Language
body:
## "England and America are two countries separated by the same language."

George Bernard Shaw

title: The Unreasonable Man
body:
## "The reasonable man adapts himself to the world; the unreasonable one persists in trying to adapt the world to himself. Therefore all progress depends on the unreasonable man."

George Bernard Shaw

title: Youth Wasted on the Young
body:
## "Youth is wasted on the young."

George Bernard Shaw

title: Wasted Time
body:
## "The time you enjoy wasting is not wasted time."

Bertrand Russell

title: Fools and Fanatics
body:
## "The whole problem with the world is that fools and fanatics are always so certain of themselves, and wiser people so full of doubts."

Bertrand Russell

title: As cunning as a fox
body:
## "As cunning as a fox who's just been appointed Professor of Cunning at Oxford University."

Edmund Blackadder

title: A Cunning Plan
body:
## "I have a plan so cunning you could brush your teeth with it."

Edmund Blackadder

title: I have a plan, and
body:
## "I have a plan, and it's as hot as my turnip."

Baldrick, Blackadder Goes Forth

title: Plant the British Flag
body:
## "I want to be the first man to reach the North Pole. I want to plant the British flag there and say: 'This is mine.'"

Edmund Blackadder

title: I have a cunning plan
body:
## "I have a cunning plan."

Baldrick, Blackadder

title: I've got a plan so cunning
grift: I've got a plan so cunning
body:
## "I've got a plan so cunning you could put a tail on it and call it a weasel."

Edmund Blackadder

title: Cowpats from the Devil
body:
## "The path of my life is strewn with cowpats from the devil's own satanic herd."

Edmund Blackadder

title: Self-Removing Trousers
body:
## "I'm as happy as a Frenchman who's just invented a pair of self-removing trousers."

Edmund Blackadder

title: The war started because of
body:
## "The war started because of the vile Hun and his villainous empire-building. Or, to put it another way, it started because of the vile British and their villainous empire-building."

Edmund Blackadder

title: The British Queue
body:
## "The British invented the queue as a form of social control. It works perfectly."

Anonymous

title: Sorry
body:
## "Sorry."

The British response to everything, including when someone else bumps into you

title: Cup of Tea
body:
## "In moments of crisis, the British instinctively reach for a cup of tea."

Anonymous

title: Not Entirely Sure
body:
## "I'm not entirely sure that's quite right."

The British way of saying something is catastrophically wrong

title: You stupid boy!
body:
## "You stupid boy!"

Captain Mainwaring, Dad's Army

title: The Answer to the Great
body:
## "The Answer to the Great Question of Life, the Universe and Everything is... Forty-two."

Douglas Adams

title: I love deadlines
body:
## "I love deadlines. I love the whooshing noise they make as they go by."

Douglas Adams

title: Don't Panic
body:
## "Don't Panic."

Douglas Adams, The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

title: Far out in the uncharted
body:
## "Far out in the uncharted backwaters of the unfashionable end of the western spiral arm of the Galaxy lies a small unregarded yellow sun. Orbiting this at a distance of roughly ninety-two million miles is an utterly insignificant little blue-green planet whose ape-descended life forms are so amazingly primitive that they still think digital watches are a pretty neat idea."

Douglas Adams

title: Time is an illusion
body:
## "Time is an illusion. Lunchtime doubly so."

Douglas Adams

title: The Universe, as has been
body:
## "The Universe, as has been observed before, is an unsettlingly big place, a fact which for the sake of a quiet life most people tend to ignore."

Douglas Adams

title: Tired of London
body:
## "When a man is tired of London, he is tired of life; for there is in London all that life can afford."

Samuel Johnson

title: Patriotism
body:
## "Patriotism is the last refuge of a scoundrel."

Samuel Johnson

title: I'm playing all the right notes
grift: I'm playing all the right notes
body:
## "I'm playing all the right notes, but not necessarily in the right order."

Eric Morecambe

title: You can't see the join
body:
## "You can't see the join."

Eric Morecambe (about Ernie Wise's toupee)

title: I'm so sorry. I'm afraid
body:
## "I'm so sorry. I'm afraid we're fresh out of communication skills."

Basil Fawlty

title: Don't mention the war!
body:
## "Don't mention the war! I mentioned it once, but I think I got away with it."

Basil Fawlty

title: I Tried, Sybil
body:
## "Oh, I know, I know. You're going to say I should have done something about it sooner. Well, I tried, Sybil, I tried."

Basil Fawlty

title: Just a Flesh Wound
body:
## "It's just a flesh wound."

Graham Chapman as the Black Knight

title: Idling Thoroughly
body:
## "It is impossible to enjoy idling thoroughly unless one has plenty of work to do."

Jerome K. Jerome

title: I Like Work
body:
## "I like work; it fascinates me. I can sit and look at it for hours."

Jerome K. Jerome

title: Creativity is not a talent
body:
## "Creativity is not a talent. It is a way of operating."

John Cleese

title: Life is too short to learn
grift: Life is too short to learn
body:
## "Life is too short to learn German."

John Cleese

title: This parrot is no more!
body:
## "This parrot is no more! It has ceased to be! It's expired and gone to meet its maker! This is a late parrot!"

John Cleese, Monty Python

title: 'Tis but a scratch
body:
## "'Tis but a scratch."

The Black Knight, Monty Python and the Holy Grail

title: Knights Who Say Ni
body:
## "We are the Knights Who Say... Ni!"

Monty Python and the Holy Grail

title: Nobody expects the Spanish Inquisition!
body:
## "Nobody expects the Spanish Inquisition!"

Monty Python's Flying Circus

title: Air-Speed Velocity
body:
## "What is the air-speed velocity of an unladen swallow?"

Monty Python and the Holy Grail

title: He's not the Messiah
body:
## "He's not the Messiah — he's a very naughty boy!"

Monty Python's Life of Brian

title: All right, but apart from
body:
## "All right, but apart from the sanitation, the medicine, education, wine, public order, irrigation, roads, the fresh-water system, and public health, what have the Romans ever done for us?"

Monty Python's Life of Brian

title: She's a Witch
body:
## "She's a witch! Burn her!"

Monty Python and the Holy Grail

title: No Words Needed
body:
## "Mr. Bean's greatest achievement was proving that you don't need words to be funny."

Rowan Atkinson

title: Cheap Music
body:
## "Extraordinary how potent cheap music is."

Noël Coward

title: Television
body:
## "Television is for appearing on, not looking at."

Noël Coward

title: Work Is Fun
body:
## "Work is much more fun than fun."

Noël Coward

title: Lovely jubbly!
body:
## "Lovely jubbly!"

Del Boy Trotter, Only Fools and Horses

title: This time next year, Rodney
body:
## "This time next year, Rodney, we'll be millionaires."

Del Boy Trotter, Only Fools and Horses

title: Always forgive your enemies
body:
## "Always forgive your enemies — nothing annoys them so much."

Oscar Wilde

title: America had often been discovered
body:
## "America had often been discovered before Columbus, but it had always been hushed up."

Oscar Wilde

title: Be yourself; everyone else
body:
## "Be yourself; everyone else is already taken."

Oscar Wilde

title: Fashion is a form of
body:
## "Fashion is a form of ugliness so intolerable that we have to alter it every six months."

Oscar Wilde

title: I can resist everything
body:
## "I can resist everything except temptation."

Oscar Wilde

title: The truth is rarely pure
body:
## "The truth is rarely pure and never simple."

Oscar Wilde

title: In this world there are
body:
## "In this world there are only two tragedies. One is not getting what one wants, and the other is getting it."

Oscar Wilde

title: Work is the curse of
body:
## "Work is the curse of the drinking classes."

Oscar Wilde

title: I Am Nobody
body:
## "I have no personality of my own. I am a chameleon. When not playing a role, I am nobody."

Peter Sellers

title: It is a good rule in life
grift: It is a good rule in life
body:
## "It is a good rule in life never to apologize. The right sort of people do not want apologies, and the wrong sort take a mean advantage of them."

P.G. Wodehouse

title: Aunts aren't gentlemen
body:
## "Aunts aren't gentlemen."

P.G. Wodehouse

title: I could see that, if not
grift: I could see that, if not
body:
## "I could see that, if not actually disgruntled, he was far from being gruntled."

P.G. Wodehouse

title: The brain of Jeeves
body:
## "The brain of Jeeves, I have always maintained, is of the order that does not come along more than once in a generation."

P.G. Wodehouse

title: Marriage is not a word
body:
## "Marriage is not a word but a sentence."

P.G. Wodehouse

title: All I ask is the chance
grift: All I ask is the chance
body:
## "All I ask is the chance to prove that money can't make me happy."

Spike Milligan

title: Money can't buy you happiness
body:
## "Money can't buy you happiness, but it does bring you a more pleasant form of misery."

Spike Milligan

title: I told you I was ill
grift: I told you I was ill
body:
## "I told you I was ill."

Spike Milligan (his tombstone inscription)

title: Not Afraid of Dying
body:
## "I'm not afraid of dying. I just don't want to be there when it happens."

Spike Milligan

title: An original idea. That
body:
## "An original idea. That can't be too hard. The library must be full of them."

Stephen Fry

title: Books are no more threatened
body:
## "Books are no more threatened by Kindle than stairs by elevators."

Stephen Fry

title: It's not all bad
body:
## "It's not all bad. Heightened self-consciousness, apartness, an inability to join in, physical shame and self-loathing — they are not all bad. Those devils have been my angels."

Stephen Fry

title: Life Passes Before Your Eyes
body:
## "It is often said that before you die your life passes before your eyes. It is in fact true. It's called living."

Terry Pratchett

title: Five Exclamation Marks
body:
## "Five exclamation marks, the sure sign of an insane mind."

Terry Pratchett

title: In the Beginning
body:
## "In the beginning there was nothing, which exploded."

Terry Pratchett

title: Million-to-One Chances
body:
## "Million-to-one chances crop up nine times out of ten."

Terry Pratchett

title: The Intelligence of a Crowd
body:
## "The intelligence of that creature known as a crowd is the square root of the number of people in it."

Terry Pratchett

title: Keep Your Head
body:
## "If you can keep your head when all around you have lost theirs, then you probably haven't understood the seriousness of the situation."

David Brent, The Office

title: A Good Idea
body:
## "A good idea is a good idea forever."

David Brent, The Office

title: A pint? That's very nearly
body:
## "A pint? That's very nearly an armful!"

Tony Hancock, The Blood Donor

title: Magna Carta
body:
## "Does Magna Carta mean nothing to you? Did she die in vain?"

Tony Hancock, Twelve Angry Men

title: Four Candles
body:
## "Four candles!"

Ronnie Barker, The Two Ronnies (Fork Handles sketch)

title: Goodnight from Him
body:
## "It's goodnight from me... and it's goodnight from him."

The Two Ronnies

title: No No No Yes
body:
## "No, no, no, no, no... yes."

Geraldine Granger, The Vicar of Dibley

title: I'm not going on a diet
grift: I'm not going on a diet
body:
## "I'm not going on a diet. I'm going to eat sensibly. There's a difference. A diet is when you eat food you hate to look like someone you admire."

Victoria Wood

title: I come from a long line
grift: I come from a long line
body:
## "I come from a long line of people who were not very good at anything."

Victoria Wood

title: Worst Form of Government
body:
## "Democracy is the worst form of government, except for all the others."

Winston Churchill

title: History Will Be Kind
body:
## "History will be kind to me for I intend to write it."

Winston Churchill

title: Jaw-Jaw
body:
## "To jaw-jaw is always better than to war-war."

Winston Churchill

title: Pessimist vs Optimist
body:
## "A pessimist sees the difficulty in every opportunity; an optimist sees the opportunity in every difficulty."

Winston Churchill

title: Easily Satisfied
body:
## "I am easily satisfied with the very best."

Winston Churchill

title: That would be a very courageous
grift: That would be a very courageous
body:
## "That would be a very courageous decision, Minister."

Sir Humphrey Appleby, Yes Minister

title: A politician's job is to
body:
## "A politician's job is to make decisions. The Civil Service's job is to make sure they don't."

Sir Humphrey Appleby, Yes Minister
